title: Supply Chain Manager - Shadowfax - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Shadowfax - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shadowfax. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Rajkot-based team.

About Shadowfax:
Shadowfax is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
